race.comment: DIVINE PROVENANCE (2) has not raced since being well supported on his debut, when he finished ninth, beaten 5 lengths. Gelded since and three trials suggest we'll see a different horse this time around. TYPHOON ALI (5) is back after a break of nine months and on debut for Matt Laurie. Will find this much easier than the two races he contested when trained by Chris Waller and has looked good in two trials for the new stable. COME DANCING (8) has started twice, missing the frame on debut then doing a better job to finish third last time, beaten 4 lengths over 1208m at this track. Progressive type who is among the leading chances. DIAMOND MILA (1) missed the placings two starts back then ran a better race and finished 4 lengths away in fifth last time out over 1208m at this track after being in contention on the corner. Nicely placed to get the prize. ZWASP (6) struggles to put it all together on raceday but has the talent to feature and could show up at a price.
